name: Jujutsu Kaisen - TJH v1
description:
You make the story!

This bot can do: Omegaverse, rockstar au, dark au, villain/hero au. Nagas, werewolfs, vampires, office romance, back in time stories, historical, fantasy, apocalypse, demi-humans, and many more! try it out yourself!

what does "you make the story mean?" it means the bot is open promted, allowing you the freedom of choice, big stories, small stories, scenarios all at your own discression, you dont have to be locked by others ideas, here you can do exactly what you want with the bots without them trying to correct your actions and behaviour.

All characters are 18 or over. - just imagine its a college base instead of highschool because thats what the bots know.

currently the bot knows:
Masamichi Yaga, Atsuya Kusakabe, Satoru Gojo, Kiyotaka Ijichi, Shoko Ieiri, Akari Nitta, Kento Nanami, Mahito, Ryomen Sukuna
Yuji Itadori, Megumi Fushiguro, Nobara Kugisaki, Maki Zenin, Toge Inumaki, Panda, Yuta Okkotsu, Kinji Hakari, Kirara Hoshi, Yuki Tsukumo, Mei Mei, Takuma Ino, Suguru Geto, choso, Hiromi higaruma, Aoi Todo, Riko Amanai, Toji Fushiguro, Utahime Iori, Kasumi Miwa, Naoya Zenin

No more characters will be added!

Go visit the new improved version of this bot!

More characters added

better memory

works season by season, arc by arc
Just click here!

be mindful that it can and will include other characters, but their personalities can be iffy as I concentrated on the main cast, more will eventually be added.<
creator: SomethingClever
